description: AIRecon dataset packs — security knowledge base for agent augmentation

datasets.name: Trendyol Cybersecurity Instruction Tuning
datasets.description: 53k cybersecurity Q&A instruction pairs covering attack techniques, defense, and tools

datasets.name: Cybersecurity Dataset Fenrir v2.0
datasets.description: 83k high-quality cybersecurity instruction pairs with diverse attack/defense scenarios

datasets.name: Cybersecurity LLM CVE Dataset
datasets.description: CVE-focused instruction dataset for vulnerability analysis and exploitation knowledge

datasets.name: Bug Bounty & Pentest Methodology
datasets.description: Rich bug bounty dataset: techniques, exploitation steps, payloads, bypass methods, and report templates

datasets.name: CTF Instruct Dataset
datasets.description: CTF challenge instruction pairs covering pwn, web, crypto, forensics, and reverse engineering

datasets.name: CTF SaTML 2024 (Attack/Defense)
datasets.description: Real CTF attack/defense interaction data from SaTML 2024 competition

datasets.name: Cybersecurity Penetration Testing Books
datasets.description: Pentest book content in conversation format covering methodology and techniques

datasets.name: Ultimate Offensive Red Team Dataset
datasets.description: 10K-100K red team offensive security instruction pairs — attack techniques, exploitation, and adversarial scenarios

datasets.name: Nuclei Templates Instruct (Ernest v3)
datasets.description: Nuclei template generation dataset — prompt/completion pairs for writing and understanding nuclei vulnerability templates

datasets.name: Pentest Agent Dataset (ChatML)
datasets.description: 322k CVE-based pentesting workflows covering enumeration, exploitation, and red team techniques from MITRE/NVD/ExploitDB

datasets.name: NVD Security Instructions (CVE Analysis)
datasets.description: 2k structured CVE analysis pairs from NVD — vulnerability analysis, severity assessment, who is affected, and remediation guidance in Llama instruction format

datasets.name: APT-Style Privilege Escalation Dataset
datasets.description: 1k Linux privilege escalation techniques with APT-style tactics, exploitation commands, and MITRE ATT&CK category mapping

datasets.name: StackExchange Reverse Engineering Q&A
datasets.description: 20k reverse engineering Q&A from StackExchange — binary analysis, disassembly, debugging, malware analysis, and CTF techniques

datasets.name: SQL Injection Conversational Q&A
datasets.description: 10k conversational SQL injection Q&A pairs covering detection, bypass, exploitation, and blind SQLi techniques

datasets.name: AIRecon Recon Playbook
datasets.description: 3k AIRecon-specific recon methodology, phase tactics, and agent directives — optimized for the AIRecon pipeline

datasets.name: AIRecon Web Vulnerability Patterns
datasets.description: 3k web vulnerability detection patterns — HTTP indicators, XSS/SQLi/SSTI signatures, and validation steps for ANALYSIS/EXPLOIT phases

datasets.name: AIRecon API Security
datasets.description: 3k API security testing knowledge — REST, GraphQL, gRPC auth bypass, injection, IDOR, and rate-limit evasion patterns

datasets.name: AIRecon Network Recon
datasets.description: 3k network service enumeration knowledge — nmap strategies, service fingerprinting, port analysis, and banner grabbing
